description: Candidate funnel, decision evidence, and downstream outcome trace.

panels.title: Discovered

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(candidate_id) AS value FROM v_candidate_decision_facts WHERE discovered_at >= $__timeFrom() AND discovered_at <= $__timeTo() AND COALESCE(source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' AND COALESCE(security_risk::text, '') ~* '^(${securityRisk:regex})$' AND COALESCE(daypart::text, '') ~* '^(${daypart:regex})$' AND COALESCE(config_version::text, '') ~* '^(${configVersion:regex})$' AND ('${mint}' = '' OR COALESCE(mint::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${mint}' || '%') AND ('${symbol}' = '' OR COALESCE(symbol::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${symbol}' || '%') AND COALESCE(status::text, '') ~* '^(${candidateStatus:regex})$'

panels.description: Discovered candidates in the current selection scope.

panels.title: Acceptance Rate

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE((SUM(CASE WHEN accepted THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(candidate_id), 0)) * 100, 0) AS value FROM v_candidate_decision_facts WHERE decision_at >= $__timeFrom() AND decision_at <= $__timeTo() AND COALESCE(source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' AND COALESCE(security_risk::text, '') ~* '^(${securityRisk:regex})$' AND COALESCE(daypart::text, '') ~* '^(${daypart:regex})$' AND COALESCE(config_version::text, '') ~* '^(${configVersion:regex})$' AND ('${mint}' = '' OR COALESCE(mint::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${mint}' || '%') AND ('${symbol}' = '' OR COALESCE(symbol::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${symbol}' || '%') AND COALESCE(status::text, '') ~* '^(${candidateStatus:regex})$'

panels.description: Weighted acceptance rate for the selected candidate slice.

panels.title: Bought

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(candidate_id) AS value FROM v_candidate_decision_facts WHERE decision_at >= $__timeFrom() AND decision_at <= $__timeTo() AND bought = TRUE AND COALESCE(source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' AND COALESCE(security_risk::text, '') ~* '^(${securityRisk:regex})$' AND COALESCE(daypart::text, '') ~* '^(${daypart:regex})$' AND COALESCE(config_version::text, '') ~* '^(${configVersion:regex})$' AND ('${mint}' = '' OR COALESCE(mint::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${mint}' || '%') AND ('${symbol}' = '' OR COALESCE(symbol::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${symbol}' || '%')

panels.description: Candidates that progressed to buys in the current slice.

panels.title: Avg Entry Score

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(entry_score), 0) AS value FROM v_candidate_decision_facts WHERE decision_at >= $__timeFrom() AND decision_at <= $__timeTo() AND COALESCE(source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' AND COALESCE(security_risk::text, '') ~* '^(${securityRisk:regex})$' AND COALESCE(daypart::text, '') ~* '^(${daypart:regex})$' AND COALESCE(config_version::text, '') ~* '^(${configVersion:regex})$' AND ('${mint}' = '' OR COALESCE(mint::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${mint}' || '%') AND ('${symbol}' = '' OR COALESCE(symbol::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${symbol}' || '%')

panels.description: Average entry score for the selected decision slice.

panels.title: Downstream Win Rate

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE((SUM(CASE WHEN downstream_outcome = 'win' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN downstream_outcome IN ('win', 'loss') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)) * 100, 0) AS value FROM v_candidate_decision_facts WHERE decision_at >= $__timeFrom() AND decision_at <= $__timeTo() AND COALESCE(source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' AND COALESCE(security_risk::text, '') ~* '^(${securityRisk:regex})$' AND COALESCE(daypart::text, '') ~* '^(${daypart:regex})$' AND COALESCE(config_version::text, '') ~* '^(${configVersion:regex})$' AND ('${mint}' = '' OR COALESCE(mint::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${mint}' || '%') AND ('${symbol}' = '' OR COALESCE(symbol::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${symbol}' || '%')

panels.description: How often accepted candidates eventually turned into downstream wins.

panels.title: Funnel Trend by Status

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', decision_at)::timestamp AS "time", status AS metric, COUNT(candidate_id)::int AS value FROM v_candidate_decision_facts WHERE decision_at >= $__timeFrom() AND decision_at <= $__timeTo() AND COALESCE(source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' AND COALESCE(security_risk::text, '') ~* '^(${securityRisk:regex})$' AND COALESCE(daypart::text, '') ~* '^(${daypart:regex})$' AND COALESCE(config_version::text, '') ~* '^(${configVersion:regex})$' AND ('${mint}' = '' OR COALESCE(mint::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${mint}' || '%') AND ('${symbol}' = '' OR COALESCE(symbol::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${symbol}' || '%') AND COALESCE(status::text, '') ~* '^(${candidateStatus:regex})$' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2

panels.description: Daily funnel movement by candidate status.

panels.title: Reject Reason Trend

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', decision_at)::timestamp AS "time", COALESCE(reject_reason, 'accepted_or_unknown') AS metric, COUNT(candidate_id)::int AS value FROM v_candidate_decision_facts WHERE decision_at >= $__timeFrom() AND decision_at <= $__timeTo() AND COALESCE(source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' AND COALESCE(security_risk::text, '') ~* '^(${securityRisk:regex})$' AND COALESCE(daypart::text, '') ~* '^(${daypart:regex})$' AND COALESCE(config_version::text, '') ~* '^(${configVersion:regex})$' AND ('${mint}' = '' OR COALESCE(mint::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${mint}' || '%') AND ('${symbol}' = '' OR COALESCE(symbol::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${symbol}' || '%') AND COALESCE(COALESCE(reject_reason, 'accepted_or_unknown')::text, '') ~* '^(${rejectReason:regex})$' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2

panels.description: Reject-reason drift over time for the current scope.

panels.title: Candidate Decision Trace

targets.rawSql: SELECT candidate_id, mint, symbol, source, config_version, status, reject_reason, entry_score, exit_profile, daypart, security_risk, liquidity_band, volume_band, downstream_outcome, realized_pnl_usd FROM v_candidate_decision_facts WHERE decision_at >= $__timeFrom() AND decision_at <= $__timeTo() AND COALESCE(source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' AND COALESCE(security_risk::text, '') ~* '^(${securityRisk:regex})$' AND COALESCE(daypart::text, '') ~* '^(${daypart:regex})$' AND COALESCE(config_version::text, '') ~* '^(${configVersion:regex})$' AND ('${mint}' = '' OR COALESCE(mint::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${mint}' || '%') AND ('${symbol}' = '' OR COALESCE(symbol::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${symbol}' || '%') AND COALESCE(status::text, '') ~* '^(${candidateStatus:regex})$' AND COALESCE(COALESCE(reject_reason, 'accepted_or_unknown')::text, '') ~* '^(${rejectReason:regex})$' ORDER BY entry_score DESC NULLS LAST, decision_at DESC LIMIT 100

panels.description: Decision spine for why candidates passed, failed, or eventually paid off.

panels.title: Latest Filter State

targets.rawSql: SELECT mint, symbol, source, status, reject_reason, security_risk, liquidity_usd, volume_5m_usd, buy_sell_ratio, top10_holder_percent, largest_holder_percent, price_usd, market_cap_usd, last_snapshot_at FROM v_candidate_latest_filter_state WHERE COALESCE(source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' AND ('${mint}' = '' OR COALESCE(mint::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${mint}' || '%') AND ('${symbol}' = '' OR COALESCE(symbol::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${symbol}' || '%') ORDER BY last_snapshot_at DESC LIMIT 100

panels.description: Latest normalized filter evidence for active candidate rows.

targets.rawSql: SELECT captured_at, mint, symbol, trigger, source, config_version, price_usd, liquidity_usd, volume_5m_usd, buy_sell_ratio, top10_holder_percent, security_risk FROM v_token_snapshot_enriched WHERE captured_at >= $__timeFrom() AND captured_at <= $__timeTo() AND COALESCE(source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' AND COALESCE(config_version::text, '') ~* '^(${configVersion:regex})$' AND ('${mint}' = '' OR COALESCE(mint::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${mint}' || '%') AND ('${symbol}' = '' OR COALESCE(symbol::text, '') ILIKE '%' || '${symbol}' || '%') AND COALESCE(trigger::text, '') ~* '^(${trigger:regex})$' ORDER BY captured_at DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Provider Payload Evidence

targets.rawSql: SELECT captured_at, provider, endpoint, status_code, error_family, entity_key, latency_ms, error_message FROM v_raw_api_payload_recent WHERE captured_at >= $__timeFrom() AND captured_at <= $__timeTo() AND ('${mint}' = '' OR entity_key ILIKE '%' || '${mint}' || '%') ORDER BY captured_at DESC LIMIT 100

panels.description: Raw provider failures and payload evidence for mint-focused RCA.

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT source AS __text, source AS __value FROM v_candidate_decision_facts ORDER BY 1
list.label: Source
list.name: source
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT source AS __text, source AS __value FROM v_candidate_decision_facts ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT config_version::text AS __text, config_version::text AS __value FROM v_candidate_decision_facts ORDER BY 1 DESC
list.label: Config Version
list.name: configVersion
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT config_version::text AS __text, config_version::text AS __value FROM v_candidate_decision_facts ORDER BY 1 DESC

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT status AS __text, status AS __value FROM v_candidate_decision_facts ORDER BY 1
list.label: Candidate Status
list.name: candidateStatus
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT status AS __text, status AS __value FROM v_candidate_decision_facts ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(reject_reason, 'accepted_or_unknown') AS __text, COALESCE(reject_reason, 'accepted_or_unknown') AS __value FROM v_candidate_decision_facts ORDER BY 1
list.label: Reject Reason
list.name: rejectReason
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(reject_reason, 'accepted_or_unknown') AS __text, COALESCE(reject_reason, 'accepted_or_unknown') AS __value FROM v_candidate_decision_facts ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT trigger AS __text, trigger AS __value FROM v_snapshot_trigger_daily ORDER BY 1
list.label: Trigger
list.name: trigger
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT trigger AS __text, trigger AS __value FROM v_snapshot_trigger_daily ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT security_risk AS __text, security_risk AS __value FROM v_candidate_decision_facts ORDER BY 1
list.label: Security Risk
list.name: securityRisk
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT security_risk AS __text, security_risk AS __value FROM v_candidate_decision_facts ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT daypart AS __text, daypart AS __value FROM v_candidate_decision_facts ORDER BY 1
list.label: Daypart
list.name: daypart
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT daypart AS __text, daypart AS __value FROM v_candidate_decision_facts ORDER BY 1

title: Candidate & Funnel Analytics
